content.en:
"I have absorbed a large amount of pole-making substances, so it should not be difficult to break the chain of pole-making!",

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In an instant, he frantically absorbed all the resources, continuously providing energy to enhance his body of control and impact the chains of the Pole.

Thundered!!!!

Under the impact again and again, the chains of the pole began to crack.

Time passed slowly, and the chain of Polar Creation finally couldn't bear it anymore under countless impacts, and it completely shattered.

And the energy contained in the Extreme Creation Chain poured into Ye Tian's controlling body, and began to improve Ye Tian's controlling body.

"The energy contained in the Pole Creation Chain is actually an incomparably pure Pole Creation Substance!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Of course, the pole-making material of the pole-making chain is different from the pole-making material that is usually absorbed and refined, and this pole-making substance seems to be the origin of the pole-making substance.

I saw that after Ye Tian's controlling body absorbed the energy of the Extreme Creation Chain, the controlling body began to undergo an earth-shaking transformation, and the half-step perfectly controlled body began to transform into the half-step perfectly controlled body of the Extreme Creation Realm.

At the same time, Ye Tian's will was also affected, and he was also transforming, and the half-step perfectly controlled body in his body had also become the power of creation.

This moment.

Ye Tian was frantically absorbing the energy of the outside world and was promoted to a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

At this time, the high-level leaders of the Wudao Tower knew about Ye Tian's breakthrough.

"Ye Tian has broken through!"

The Lord of Time's gaze looked at the branch tower of the Daoless Tower where Ye Tian was.

This breakthrough meant that Ye Tian was about to become a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, which was also a big thing for the Daoless Tower.

After all, every half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm has extremely great potential in the future, and there is a 100% chance of becoming a perfect controller in the future, and it can also be in the ranks of the strongest among the perfect controllers.

These half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Creation Realm are the foundation of the future of the Wudao Tower, and no matter how many ordinary perfect controllers there are, it is of little significance.

Of course, there are a large number of ordinary perfect controllers, who can easily manage many affairs of the Daoless Tower, and they are also the backbone of the Daoless Tower, an indispensable existence.

Soon.

The other Perfection Masters of the Daoless Tower, as well as some of the Extreme Creation Realm Half-Step Perfect Controllers, also knew that the Daoless Tower was about to give birth to a new Extreme Creation Realm Half-Step Perfect Master.

And the news spread quickly, and the entire Wudao Pagoda knew about it.

"Little junior brother is about to break through to the Extreme Creation Realm and be a half-step perfect controller?"

The Black Rotten Ruler was astonished.

That's too fast, isn't it?

He also knew how terrifying the strength of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm was, which was equivalent to a weaker perfect master, and there were only thirty-three half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm before the entire Daoless Tower, and it was the number accumulated over countless years.

And now, there is one more half-step perfect controller of the Endless Dao Tower's Creation Realm.

From now on, his junior brother Ye Tian's status in the Wudao Tower will be no different from that of the perfect controller, far from being comparable to these ordinary, top-notch, and peak half-step perfect controllers, but belonging to another level.

"The talent of the little junior brother is too demonic, but with the little junior brother, my achievements in the future should not be bad!"

The Black Rotten Ruler thought to himself.

Anyway, he decided, and he will hold the thighs of the little junior brother in the future.

......

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's transformation took a long time, even if the origin energy possessed in the Wudao Tower was almost endless, which could allow Ye Tian to continue to absorb it, plus he also had a lot of his own resources, and he also took them all out to absorb and refine, but it would still take a long time to complete the transformation.

Because going from a peak half-step perfect master to a half-step perfection master of the Extreme Realm was a huge improvement, so it took so long.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally completed a complete breakthrough and reached the realm of a half-step perfect controller in the Extreme Creation Realm.

Now.

The aura of Ye Tian's body was completely different from before, and his body was already a body that was perfectly controlled by half a step in the Extreme Creation Realm, which was also referred to as the Body of Creation Extreme.

The Extreme Body is not only a half-step Perfect Controlling Body that far surpasses the Perfection Realm, but once it breaks through to the Perfect Controller Realm in the future, it will transform into a Superior Perfection Ancestral Body.

Moreover, the body of the Extreme also has the golden light of the Extreme, which has an incomparably powerful defensive effect, and can also be integrated into the attack, bursting out with an incomparably powerful attack effect.

"My will and my body of control have reached the level of the Extreme Creation Realm, and with my current strength, I am enough to instantly kill my previous self!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this moment, he knew how powerful the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm was, far from being comparable to the peak half-step perfect master.

Of course.

Among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, he was still very weak.

Many half-step perfection masters of the Extreme Creation Realm are not in a hurry to impact the perfect master, although each of them can break through immediately, but there is no point.

After all, when you reach the realm of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, it is all for the sake of a broader future, but if you don't impact the perfect controller now, the potential will be reduced a lot.

Therefore, when it comes to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, it is possible to continuously improve the strength, and the strength of some half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm is much stronger than Ye Tian.

Therefore, he still has to work hard to cultivate now.

Airplanes!

A message came, a message from the upper echelons of the Wudao Tower.

This message first congratulated him on becoming a half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, and the second was to let him go to the main tower of the Daoless Tower to upgrade the branch tower, after all, the branch tower owned by the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm is naturally more powerful.

Moreover, he also needs to reclaim the identity token, as well as the resources that belong to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

In addition, after becoming the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, you can enter a small organization in the Daoless Tower, the Extreme Tower!

The Pole Creation Tower is a small organization inside the Daoless Tower, and only those who have a half-step perfect control of the Extreme Creation Realm can enter, and by entering this small organization, they can get more secret information for the first time, and they can also get more information and treatment.

Soon.

Ye Tian handled these things well, and also successfully joined the Pole Tower.

The Daoless Tower has specially arranged a sub-tower for the small organization of the Pole Tower, so that every half-step perfect master of the Extreme Realm can enter this tower for meetings, discussions, and discussions.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian entered the Pole Creation Tower, and soon encountered other Pole Creation Realm half-step perfect controllers.

Moreover, if the newcomer joins, if the other half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm are free, they will naturally come to congratulate Ye Tian.

"Congratulations to Ye Tian for joining us to build the Pole Tower!"

A half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm congratulated.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Immediately, he gradually became familiar with these half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, and also obtained the contact information of each of them.
